description: This intracranial electrophysiology dataset contains recordings from human subjects viewing visual stimuli including spiral gratings of varying colors and luminance levels, as well as color words. The dataset comprises eight different square wave spiral gratings and two color word stimuli, each presented for 116 ms, with corresponding event markers for stimulus identification. This resource supports investigation of visual processing and color representation in human cortex.
methods_description: Visual stimuli consisting of eight square wave spiral gratings (10 degrees visual angle) and two color words were presented for 116 ms each. Stimuli included light and dark variants of pink, blue, green, and orange spirals, as well as the words 'blue' and 'green' displayed in white on a gray background. Intracranial electrophysiological (iEEG) recordings were acquired during stimulus presentation using implanted electrodes.
